hero.title: Professional HDPE Plastic Netting Manufacturer Since 2005
hero.subtitle: Leading manufacturer of construction safety nets, agricultural nets, and specialty plastic netting solutions. Exporting to 50+ countries worldwide.

about.title: About JIACHENG NETTING
about.subtitle: Your Trusted HDPE Netting Partner Since 2005
about.description: JIACHENG NETTING is a leading manufacturer of high-quality HDPE plastic netting products, specializing in construction safety nets, agricultural nets, and custom netting solutions. With over 18 years of experience, we serve customers in more than 50 countries worldwide.

products.name: Debris Netting
products.description: High-strength debris containment netting for construction sites and scaffolding protection.

products.name: Scaffolding Netting
products.description: Durable scaffold enclosure nets for worker and pedestrian safety.

products.name: Shade Net / Sun Shade Netting
products.description: UV-stabilized shade cloth for agricultural, residential, and commercial applications.

products.name: Dust Suppression Net / Windbreak Net
products.description: Windbreak and dust control netting for construction sites, mines, and ports.

products.name: Hail Protection Net
products.description: Anti-hail netting for fruit orchards and crop protection.

products.name: Olive Collection Net / Olive Netting
products.description: Harvest nets designed specifically for olive collection.

products.name: Bird Control Net / Anti-Bird Netting
products.description: Bird exclusion netting for agriculture, buildings, and fisheries.

products.name: Agricultural Anti-Hail Net
products.description: Multi-purpose protective netting for various agricultural applications.

products.name: Insect Screen / Insect Netting
products.description: Fine mesh insect barrier for greenhouses and agriculture.

products.name: Safety Debris Netting System
products.description: Complete safety net systems compliant with EN1263-1 standards.

factory.title: Our Manufacturing Facility
factory.subtitle: State-of-the-Art Production Capability
factory.description: Our 20,000 square meter manufacturing facility is equipped with advanced German-made extrusion machines, allowing us to produce a wide range of HDPE netting products with consistent quality and competitive pricing.

process.title: Raw Material Inspection
process.desc: Premium virgin HDPE granules quality check

process.title: Weaving/Knitting

process.title: Cutting & Finishing

process.title: Quality Control
process.desc: Rigorous testing of each batch produced
